basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist, Project Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Project Research Scientist-III (Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website aiimsguwahati.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Guwahati Project Recruitment 2026 for Project Research Scientist-III (Medical), Project Technical Support-III, and Project Nurse-I posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS+ Postgraduate Degree (MD /DNB) with 3 years post PG experience, MBBS with MPH / PhD with 3 years experience, Graduate/Post Graduate in Social science/epidemiology/Public Health / Social Work / Sociology/Clinical Psychology / Psychology /Psychiatric Social Work / MLT/Life science with publications, Two years Auxiliary Nurse & Midwife (ANM) course
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-III (Medical): MBBS+ Postgraduate Degree (MD /DNB) from a recognized university with three (03) years of post PG experience in Public Health Research experience in research/projects with at least two research paper in SCI journal (Among which one as first author/corresponding author in pubmed indexed journal) or MBBS with MPH / PhD with three years' post qualification experience in Public Health Research experience in research/projects with at least two research paper in SCI journal (Among which one as first author/corresponding author in pubmed indexed journal) Project Technical Support-III: Graduate degree Social science/epidemiology/Public Health / Social Work / Sociology/Clinical Psychology / Psychology /Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology/MLT/Life science with 3 years’ post-qualification experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Social science/epidemiology/Public Health / Social Work / Sociology/Clinical Psychology / Psychology/Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology/Life science/MLT And Minimum 2 publications in pubmed indexed journal among which one as first author/corresponding author Project Nurse-I: Two years Auxiliary Nurse & Midwife (ANM) course

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test (if applicable) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsguwahati.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Guwahati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist-III (Medical): MBBS+ Postgraduate Degree (MD /DNB) from a recognized university with three (03) years of post PG experience in Public Health Research experience in research/projects with at least two research paper in SCI journal (Among which one as first author/corresponding author in pubmed indexed journal) or MBBS with MPH / PhD with three years' post qualification experience in Public Health Research experience in research/projects with at least two research paper in SCI journal (Among which one as first author/corresponding author in pubmed indexed journal) Project Technical Support-III: Graduate degree Social science/epidemiology/Public Health / Social Work / Sociology/Clinical Psychology / Psychology /Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology/MLT/Life science with 3 years’ post-qualification experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Social science/epidemiology/Public Health / Social Work / Sociology/Clinical Psychology / Psychology/Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology/Life science/MLT And Minimum 2 publications in pubmed indexed journal among which one as first author/corresponding author Project Nurse-I: Two years Auxiliary Nurse & Midwife (ANM) course

rows.event: Last date of submission of online form
Last date of submission of hard copy

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting Written Test (if applicable) Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsguwahati.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Guwahati recruitment is 03 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Research Scientist-III (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-III (Medical) post in the AIIMS Guwahati recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this AIIMS Guwahati recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Project Nurse-I?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Nurse-I post is Rs. 18000/- plus HRA, as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this AIIMS Guwahati recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the interview is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum qualifications for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support-III, a Graduate degree in relevant fields with 3 years of post-qualification experience or a Post Graduate Degree with minimum 2 publications is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Guwahati located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781101.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting, followed by a written test (if applicable), an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this AIIMS Guwahati recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.
